---
title: "\'The truest gentility.\' By Charlotte M. Yonge"
---

## \'The truest gentility.\' By Charlotte M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1897
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>The Girls\' Quarterly</i> (April 1897)124-5

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
